steps.t: The planting boxes can be found near Mílgamel in Haerondir. Mílgamel has asked you to plant the flowers and herbs she carried from Ithilien in the soi…
Mílgamel can be found at Haerondir. You have planted the various mushrooms and herbs in the soil you gathered and should now speak to Mílgamel.
Mílgamel can be found at Haerondir. The slag-water ruptured the planting box and dripped into the soil at Haerondir. You should speak to Mílgamel.
